source_pr.title: topsql: fix unstable test in reporter
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: mornyx <mornyx.z@gmail.com>

Issue Number: close #32002

### What's changed

Make sure to get the exact old value **before** the mock client sends the data, and check the incremented value after sending the data.

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: topsql: fix unstable test in reporter
failure_signature: topsql: fix unstable test in reporter
root_cause_explanation: The reporter tests had a timing race between sending data and starting to wait for it: the helper `WaitCollectCnt` captured the "old" record count at the time it was called (after sending), so if the record arrived quickly the baseline already included it and the wait would incorrectly block for an extra record and time out. This PR stabilizes the tests by capturing baseline counters before triggering the send, and then waiting for the deltas (both records and SQL meta) to increase by the expected amount.
fix_pattern: When waiting for async side effects, capture the baseline state before triggering the async action and wait for the expected delta (and all expected artifacts) rather than waiting from a potentially-late snapshot.

evidence: evidence: topsql: fix unstable test in reporter
